dc_description: A dry golden field with tall grasses fills the foreground, with a small leafy tree on the right. Behind it is a band of shrubs and darker evergreen trees on a hillside. At the top of the hill stands a stone fortress or castle wall with a square tower, set against a pale blue sky with scattered thin clouds.
novel_visual_observations: The central tower has crenellations along its top edge.
The vegetation shows strong contrast between the straw-colored field and the darker green wooded slope.
location_name: Strada Provinciale di Radicofani, Radicofani, Siena
rich_context: Strada Provinciale di Radicofani, Radicofani, Unione dei Comuni Amiata Val d'Orcia, Siena, Toscana, Italia
